title: GUFO
wikitext:
[]: GUFO             Quote Post by Enscripture » Tue Aug 18, 2020 9:43 am https://imgur.com/y7Smzk9 Tried sharpening it. So it's vaguely round shaped, has a pole on the top and bottom that goes through a + shape, has 4 crosses out of all 4 corners and has an extra piece jutting out at the cross part like Shinji's tesseract, and the white light, despite what I thought that this thing was in front of a light source, the white light is an illuminated ring that spins with the orb and the side crosses. I thought it was in front of a light and blocking it or something but its a bright ring in front of NOTHING

[]: Re: GUFO             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Aug 18, 2020 10:29 am I can see that you definitely put some thought into it, but I'm afraid you're going to have to provide some more context for us to understand what you are getting at with this

[]: Re: GUFO             Quote Post by Enscripture » Tue Aug 18, 2020 10:48 am I don't know yet, but it can't be a coincidence that the big crosses are shaped like Shinji's tessseract. I was hoping to find a hidden Nerv logo or something :d

[]: Re: GUFO             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 18, 2020 11:04 am They're called Dali crosses; they're related to tesseracts, but it's misleading to call them (or Eva-01's orbital prison) tesseracts themselves. There was some recent discussion on the GUFO here (linked post and continuing to current end of thread); includes a very useful brightened animated GIF of the thing along with other helpful images. post/895965/Thrice-Upon-A-Humanity-The-Deep-Lore-of-NTE-WIP/#895965

[]: Re: GUFO             Quote Post by Velorex » Tue Aug 18, 2020 4:11 pm A tesseract is essentially a 4-dimentional cross. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iGO12Z5Lw8s could be related to The Tesseract, Freemasonry and the gateway to God masonic stuff https://dr-david-harrison.com/freemasonry/the-tesseract-freemasonry-and-the-gateway-to-god/ https://www.masonicworld.com/education/files/oct06/PYTHAGOREAN%20TRADITION.htm

[]: Re: GUFO             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Aug 18, 2020 4:55 pm Not quite, a tesseract is the projection of a four-dimensional cube onto three-dimensional space, much like that cross-shaped thing everyone had to papercraft into a cube in primary school a dozen times is a projection of a three-dimensional cube on a two-dimensional space Or rather, a tesseract is the four dimensional thing that is beyond human comprehension, the thing we see in the movie is the projection onto 3d space

Article: GUFO
[]: GUFO             Quote Post by Enscripture » Tue Aug 18, 2020 9:43 am https://imgur.com/y7Smzk9 Tried sharpening it. So it's vaguely round shaped, has a pole on the top and bottom that goes through a + shape, has 4 crosses out of all 4 corners and has an extra piece jutting out at the cross part like Shinji's tesseract, and the white light, despite what I thought that this thing was in front of a light source, the white light is an illuminated ring that spins with the orb and the side crosses. I thought it was in front of a light and blocking it or something but its a bright ring in front of NOTHING
